name: webhook
description: Manage webhook — create an outbound webhook, update an outbound webhook, list webhooks. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Events that will trigger the webhook

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to deliver the webhook to. Note: protocol must be included as well (only https is supported)

parameters.name: verify-tls
parameters.description: Whether to enforce TLS certificate verification when delivering the webhook

parameters.name: signing-secret
parameters.description: Secret used to build an HMAC hash of the payload and passed as a header in the webhook request

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope in which the relevant events that will trigger webhooks
